title: rapuntium brevifolium
intro: Rapuntium brevifolium, also known as the meadow salsify or yellow salsify, is a perennial plant native to Europe and North Africa. Its rhizome and roots are rich in inulin, a type of fructan that has been used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease, as well as support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rapuntium brevifolium can be made by drying the roots and rhizome, and then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
